The health benefits of Fire Weed include its use in traditional medicine to treat various conditions such as burns, wounds, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.

The bioactive constituents of Fire Weed include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
